title: [v5.4] wire up --retry-delay for artifact pull
body:
This is an automated cherry-pick of #25352

/assign baude

```release-note
Fixed bug in `podman artifact pull` where the `--retry-delay` value was discarded.
```

comments.body:
> Fixes: https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-80259, https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-80260

Well this is the 5.4 branch and AFAIK we only use the 5.4-rhel branch for the RHEL builds so I don't believe this should be called as fixing becuase you need to backport it to the other branch.
